title: Senior AI Enablement Engineer
company_focus:
Online travel experience marketplace connecting travelers
with activities
description:
Change the way the world travels

Join the GetYourGuide journey to connect people with
unforgettable travel experiences around the world. Millions
look to us for unique activities they can trust, and it’s
all powered by our commitment to make every single journey
extraordinary - including yours.

Ready to unlock your potential with a community of fellow
explorers? Find your next role at our Berlin HQ or one of
our local offices around the globe, from New York to
Bangkok. Head to getyourguide.careers to take the first
step.

Team mission

Join our SaaS Operations team, where we build and operate
the technical foundations for internal AI adoption across
GetYourGuide while managing and continuously improving our
global application stack to deliver an outstanding employee
experience. Our mission is to enable safe, scalable, and
effective AI usage internally by reducing fragmentation,
setting clear standards, and helping teams access and work
with AI capabilities in a reliable, secure, and consistent
way.

You’ll work closely with colleagues in IT, Security, Legal,
and the AI Council, and partner with AI-focused teams across
the company. Together, we make sound technical choices in a
fast-moving AI landscape—keeping our systems dependable and
secure through proactive maintenance, thoughtful governance,
and a strong operational mindset.

Your mission

- Develop and support internal AI platform capabilities that
  help teams across the company adopt AI tools in a
  practical and effective way.
- Take strong ownership of initiatives, guiding them from
  early problem definition through technical evaluation,
  implementation, and ongoing improvement.
- Assess internal AI needs and translate them into scalable
  technical solutions
- Evaluate tools and approaches with attention to security,
  compliance, and operational suitability
- Drive adoption while helping reduce shadow AI and improving
  governance processes
- Serve as the senior AI technical authority within the team —
  owning the AI governance framework, leading security and
  compliance conversations, and setting the strategic
  direction for internal AI adoption.
- Work closely with cross-functional stakeholders to balance
  technical possibilities with real business needs and make
  decisions quickly in a changing landscape.
- Scale AI capability across GetYourGuide by acting as the
  primary technical escalation point and go-to advisor for
  teams navigating AI adoption, tooling decisions, and
  governance requirements.

Your toolkit

- AI Platforms and Tooling: Experience working with AI tools,
  platforms, or internal enablement solutions, with the
  ability to assess what is appropriate, safe, and effective
  for organizational use.
- Systems and Technical Breadth: A strong generalist
  background with familiarity across platform, SaaS, or
  systems-oriented environments, and the ability to operate
  comfortably across technical domains.
- Security and Governance Awareness: Understanding of
  compliance, security, and governance considerations
  related to AI adoption, including how to balance
  innovation with responsible usage.
- Business Judgment: Ability to interpret stakeholder
  requests, challenge assumptions when needed, and identify
  the underlying problem to guide better outcomes.
- Ownership and Execution: Comfort operating in ambiguity,
  making decisions, and driving progress in a new and
  evolving area.
- Communication: Strong skills in working with both technical
  and non-technical stakeholders, including the ability to
  explain trade-offs and influence decisions clearly.

Extras that give you an edge

- Background or exposure to cybersecurity or governance
- Experience in a similar role at a comparable organization
- Sysadmin or platform administration background

How we’ll make your career journey extraordinary

- Annual personal growth budget and mentorship programs for
  continuous learning and development
- Work from anywhere in the world for 30 days per year
- A hybrid working approach with three days of in office
  collaboration (Mon, Tue, Thur) and two days of optional at
  home focus time.
- Opportunities to collaborate and socialize with team members
  through quarterly team events and yearly company-wide
  events
- Monthly transportation and fitness budget
- Discounts for you, your friends, and family on GetYourGuide
  activities
- Language reimbursement program
- Health and wellness benefits

And more…

How to apply

Submit your CV/resume in English using the form below. For
tips and insights into our hiring process and culture, check
out ‘how we hire’ and ‘life at GetYourGuide’. If you have
any further questions, please don’t hesitate to get in touch
at jobs@getyourguide.com.

We’re an equal opportunities employer

Our commitment is that every qualified person will be
evaluated according to their skills regardless of age,
gender identity, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability
status, or religion. Please refrain from including your
picture and age with your application.

ai_classification_reasoning:
This role is about enabling internal AI adoption across
GetYourGuide — building platforms, governance, and tooling
for other teams to use AI, not building or training AI/ML
models directly. The engineer assesses, evaluates, and
governs AI tools rather than developing models, fine-tuning,
or deploying them hands-on.
